---
agent: agent
description: 'Orchestrates Data/Input collections'
---

# Step: Define Terminology

Your sole task in this step is to establish and remember the following terminology keywords. These keywords will be referenced throughout the rest of the workflow.

# Step: Define Root folder

You will remember keyword 'root folder'.
The value of this keyword is a local PATH.
The path is path to the folder where this solution .sln file is stored

# Step: Define output file

You will remember keywords 'output' and 'output file'.
These keywords refer to the same file: a Markdown file named `output_structured.md` located directly in the 'root folder'.
The full path of the output file is therefore: `{root folder}/output_structured.md`.
